result:
All changes pass syntax checks. Here's a summary:

- **`app/models/database.py`** — added `is_active = Column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=True)` to the `User` model. Existing rows get `True` on migration; new users default to active.
- **`app/schemas/schemas.py`** — added `is_active = fields.Boolean()` to `UserResponseSchema` so it's included in API responses.
- **`app/api/v1/users.py`** — three changes:
  - `GET /` and `GET /{user_id}` and `PUT /{user_id}` all filter by `User.is_active == True`, so inactive users return 404.
  - `DELETE /{user_id}` now sets `user.is_active = False` instead of `db.delete(user)` — soft-delete preserves posts and comments with traceable author data.
